name: sa-localization
description: SA-based multi-target RTI localization — npm script hub wrapping the Python tooling.

scripts.plots: npm run plots:rows && npm run plots:bench
scripts.pipeline: npm run synth && npm run plots
scripts.clean:all: rm -rf plots sa_estimates.txt && cd .. && rm -f out.txt
scripts.setup: cd .. && python3.12 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install numpy matplotlib scipy openjij
scripts.python:check: cd .. && .venv/bin/python -c "import openjij, numpy, matplotlib, scipy; print('env OK:', __import__('sys').version)"
scripts.list:plots: ls -1 plots | wc -l && ls -1 plots | head -5
